分享下我依家既program

我個program 係由我自身經驗再改良
係混合左push pull leg 同stronglift5x5

program 有6日

day1 leg

back squat 5x5
front squat 2x8
hip thrust 3x12
leg extension + seated leg curl(superset)
3x15
single leg press 3x12
calf raise 3x12

day2 push
bench press 5x5
dumbbell shoulder press 3x12
machine chest press 3x12
machine chest fly 2x15
bodyweight dip 3x15
lateral raise 3x12
overhead tricep extension 3x12

day3 pull

deadlift 5x5
barbell row 3x12
seated row 3x12
lat pulldown 5x12
dumbbell pullover 3x12
face pull 2x15
bicep curl 3x15

day4 leg
back squat 3x5,3x12
leg press 4x12
leg extension 3x12
leg curl 3x12
lunge 2x15
calf raise 3x15

day5 push

overhead press 5x5
incline bench press 5x5
shoulder press 3x12
bodyweight dip 3x12
lateral raise superset with front delt raise 3x15
tricep push down 3x15

day6
pendlay row 5x5
deadlift 3x10
reverse lat pulldown 3x12
hammer grip lat pulldown 3x12
seated row 3x12
bicep hammer curl 3x15
bicep curl 3x12
